name: bot-status
description: Monitoring skill for FabioBot. Checks health of Azure AD auth, Fabric API connectivity, and workspace status. Provides bot info and workspace summary.
author: FabioBot

tools.name: check_health
tools.description: Check the health of all bot dependencies: Azure AD authentication, Microsoft Fabric API connectivity, and Power BI workspace access. Returns a status report.

tools.name: get_workspace_summary
tools.description: Get a quick summary of the Power BI workspace: number of reports, semantic models, and dashboards.

tools.name: get_bot_info
tools.description: Get information about the bot configuration: version, configured workspace, LLM model, and available skills.
